name: Sugared Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Fresh asparagus, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium-high heat, melt butter and brown sugar until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Add asparagus; sauté for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in chicken broth; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 8-10 minutes or until asparagus is crisp-tender.
5. Remove asparagus to a serving dish and keep warm.
6. Cook sauce, uncovered, until reduced by half.
7. Pour the sauce over the asparagus and serve immediately.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Serves: 4-6
